title: White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame - Plastic Sidewalk Sign
metaDescription: Discover the White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame, a durable plastic sidewalk sign perfect for versatile outdoor advertising. Easy to set up and weather-resistant.

Choose between a white or black frame. For added stability, the plastic A-Frame can be filled with water or sand. Molded handles ensure easy transport. To request a double-sided printed sign, please contact our customer service representative. Great For: Outdoor Restaurant Menus Business Grand Openings Church Service Times Advertising a Storefront Sale Order Complete Kit Order Replacement Signs Order Replacement Hardware Complete Kit Kit Includes 1 — White Signicade Deluxe A-Frame Hardware 2 — 24" x 36" Full-Color Printed Signs Order Complete Kit More About Signicade Deluxe A-Frames Return to Top The A-Frame material is digitally printed on a 4mm corrugated plastic material. The material has hollow flutes similar to cardboard. The material is lightweight and waterproof. The frame holds (2) 24" x 36" printed signs—one on each side. This allows you to double your advertising while maintaining a small footprint! You can even customize each sign to say something different. Tell your guests, 'Welcome', on one side when they walk in, and 'Goodbye' on their way out of your store. Each Signicade A-Frame is foldable, making it easy to store. This allows you to save space. Even better, it has a handle that makes it a breeze to carry from inside to outside. Why Choose Banners.com? Customer Service Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. Live Order Tracking Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top What is an A-frame sign (sidewalk sign)? An A-frame sign—also called a sidewalk sign or sandwich board—is a foldable, freestanding sign used to advertise in high foot-traffic areas like storefronts, strip malls, outdoor restaurants, and near parking lots. Are these A-frames suitable for outdoor use year-round? Yes. These A-frames are made from durable plastic that won’t rust or splinter, and the frame can be filled with sand or water for added outdoor stability. Does the Simpo Sign A-frame include one or two printed inserts? It includes two (2) full-color printed signs, sized 22" × 27" (one for each side). What colors is the Simpo Sign A-frame available in? The Simpo Sign A-frame is available in white only. Do you offer other A-frame sizes or styles? Yes. In addition to the Simpo Sign A-frame (22" × 27" inserts), you also offer the Signicade Deluxe A-frame (24" × 36" sign size). Why Choose Banners.com?
